{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323203003C11B6645D05065C597C9"}"},"total":198},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7599142339257926424","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前五星，很新颖的角度，把目光聚焦于易中海被抓后，老聋子找关系捂盖子，主角拉关系掀桌的博弈中。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769316914,"group_id":"7593291853655460926","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+RfEdI4Qqkqi6cwnhfP1MQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2b94a427078e474b8a1968d5e639e832~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790155&x-signature=a9OoD7F3LaIsef8VQidIGKgMFqA%3D","user_id":"68351231843","user_name":"星辰嫂子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"68351231843","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7593291853655460926","book_info":{"abstract":"高阳穿越到四合院，父母是援建西北的技术工人，跟爷爷在四合院生活，前身遭受非人对待，以至于被易中海和傻柱害死，穿越后，惊讶的发现，易中海七年截留了8400元，把易中海送进去后，他开启了功德系统。

“叮，易中海判处死刑，奖励储物空间1万立方米”

“叮，阎解成被打死，贾东旭残废，奖励灵泉空间。”

“叮，傻柱被何大清弄死.....”

“叮，吸血白莲，聋老太......”

好好的四合院，好好的养老团怎么一年比一年少

后来，有人采访已经身居高位的高阳，

“高书记，据说您在南锣鼓巷的住址里，曾经住了一群罪犯，请问您是怎么做到出淤泥而不染的？”
